texts.label: text
texts.orig: This plan includes preventive and diagnostic, basic and restorative, and major services. After satisfaction of the deductible, this plan will provide payment for the services at the percentages listed below up to the calendar year maximum. Payment of benefits is based on a percentage of the Allowed Amount. In-Network providers have agreed to accept the Allowed Amounts as payment for services. Services of an Out-of-Network provider are based on a percentage of the Allowed Amount. The Member will be responsible for any additional charges over the Allowed Amount.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Regence complies with applicable Federal and Washington state civil rights laws and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, national origin, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation or gender identity. Regence does not exclude people or treat them less favorably because of race, color, national origin, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation or gender identity.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you need reasonable modifications, appropriate auxiliary aids and services, or language assistance services, contact the Civil Rights Coordinator.
texts.text: If you need reasonable modifications, appropriate auxiliary aids and services, or language assistance services, contact the Civil Rights Coordinator.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you believe that Regence has failed to provide these services or discriminated in another way on the basis of race, color, national origin, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation or gender identity, you can file a grievance. You can file a grievance in person or by mail, fax, or email. If you need help filing a grievance, the Civil Rights Coordinator is available to help you.
texts.text: If you believe that Regence has failed to provide these services or discriminated in another way on the basis of race, color, national origin, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation or gender identity, you can file a grievance. texts.orig: توجه : اگر به زبان فارسی صحبت می کن  ید، تسهیلات زبان  ی بصورت رایگان برای شما فراهم می باشد . با 1-888-344-6347 (TTY: 711) تماس بگیرید  .

texts.orig: ملحوظة:  إذا كنت تتحدث فاذكر اللغة، فإن خدمات المساعدة اللغویة تتوافر لك بالمجان.  اتصل برقم 1-888-344-6347 (رقم هاتف الصم والبكم (TTY: 711

table_cells.text: The total deductible You pay per calendar year

This plan will pay for Covered Services only up to this limit during each coverage period, even if Your own need is greater. You are responsible for all expenses above this limit Preventive dental services do not accumulate toward the overall annual limit
2 per calendar year, additional covered with qualifying diagnosis

Sealants - limited to permanent molars and premolars, once every 12 months, for Members under 17 years of age Space maintainers for Members under 12 years of age Topical fluoride application - 2 per calendar year for Members under 18 years of age
Preventive oral examinations, limited to two per Member per calendar year
Bitewing x-rays - 2 sets per calendar year Complete intra-oral mouth x-ray - once in a 3-year period Panoramic mouth x-ray - once in a 3-year period
Basic and Restorative Services ( unless stated otherwise, a deductible applies )
Including surgical extraction of teeth, impactions, alveoloplasty, vestibuloplasty and residual root removal
Emergency and Other Basic Dental Services
Services including root canal treatment, pulpotomy and apicoectomy
Consisting of composite or amalgam restorations

Periodontal maintenance - 2 per calendar year (in lieu of preventive cleanings), additional covered with qualifying diagnosis Debridement - once in a 3-year period Scaling and root planing - 1 in a 2-year period per quadrant
Major Services ( unless stated otherwise, a deductible applies )
Crowns, Crown Build-Ups, Inlays and Onlays
Crown repair limited to 1 per tooth per Member lifetime, Replacement 5 years after placement
Dental Implant Crown and Abutment Related Procedures
Limited to 1 per tooth in a 5-year period

table_cells.text: You will pay the most if You use an Out-of-Network dental provider, and You might receive a bill from a dental provider for the difference between the provider's charge and what Your plan pays.

Regence is committed to the confidentiality and security of Your personal information. We maintain physical, administrative and technical safeguards to protect against unauthorized access, use, or disclosure of Your personal information. You can view Our full privacy practices online at regence.com.
Is there a cost for Covered in full ?
No, if Your benefit is covered in full there is no copay or deductible.
